title: Pack PBR: Galactic Block: Empire's Legacy
description: Hello everyone! The first resource pack for Minecraft inspired by Star Wars in PBR has arrived in Minecraft!
body:
### **Hello everyone! The first resource pack for Minecraft inspired by Star Wars in PBR has arrived in Minecraft!**

Contains modified models modified weapons such as lightsabers and more.

If you want to see everything in more detail on how to enjoy this pack and its various types of add-ons to build, you can download the test map:

Test map(The test map will be updated as the pack is updated): [Download Here!](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QP0FNTDD8JNK8vBtZV_hBzmg4vVzBlu4/view?usp=drive_link)

Addon to see the invisible blocks: [Download Here!](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16f_0T8NMZsAElOrISJ55JbelmEzM0NyZ/view?usp=drive_link)

Discord!
- Everything you need to enjoy the resource pack is in our official Discord where you can download recommended shaders and mods necessary to enjoy this!
- Warning! Being such an early version of its development, there may be bugs and visual errors that are not as noticeable as possible, you can let me know on the discord server any errors you find!

[Official Discord!](https://discord.gg/yu2s4DgYuZ)
